title: Russ: Why Authenticity Outlasts the Algorithm
author: Staff
summary:
Art via Evan Solano

Show your love of the game by subscribing to Passion of the Weiss on Patreon so that we can keep churning out interviews with legendary producers, feature the best emerging rap talent in the game, and gift you the only worthwhile playlists left in this streaming hellscape.

Russ joins Jeff Weiss, Rosecrans Vic and Free at Gold Diggers in LA for a conversation that reveals how the Atlanta rapper went from opening up at a POW show at the Echo to headlining Staples Center as a multi-platinum independent artist.
